recommendations.title: The Ritual
recommendations.overview: A group of college friends reunite for a trip to the forest, but encounter a menacing presence in the woods that's stalking them.

recommendations.title: The Signal
recommendations.overview: A horror film told in three parts, from three perspectives, in which a mysterious transmission that turns people into killers invades every cell phone, radio, and television.
recommendations.director: Dan Bush, David Bruckner, Jacob Gentry

recommendations.title: Hellraiser
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling with addiction comes into possession of an ancient puzzle box, unaware that its purpose is to summon the Cenobites, a group of sadistic supernatural beings from another dimension.

recommendations.title: Waist Deep
recommendations.overview: An ex-convict gets tangled up with a gang after his car is hijacked with his son inside.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/85
recommendations.overview: Unveiled through a made-for-TV documentary, five chilling tales of found footage horror emerge to take viewers on a gore-filled journey through the grim underbelly of the forgotten 1980s.
recommendations.director: Natasha Kermani, David Bruckner, Gigi Saul Guerrero, Mike P. Nelson, Scott Derrickson

recommendations.title: Southbound
recommendations.overview: The film contains five stories set on desolate stretches of a desert highway. Two men on the run from their past, a band on its way to a gig, a man struggling to get home, a brother in search of his long-lost sister and a family on vacation are force
recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Chad Villella, Justin Martinez, Roxanne Benjamin, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin, Patrick Horvath

recommendations.title: Glitter
recommendations.overview: A young woman is catapulted into pop stardom, with her already-famous DJ boyfriend calling the shots.

recommendations.title: Nobody
recommendations.overview: Hutch Mansell, a suburban dad, overlooked husband, nothing neighbor — a "nobody." When two thieves break into his home one night, Hutch's unknown long-simmering rage is ignited and propels him on a brutal path that will uncover dark secrets he fought

recommendations.title: Gridlock'd
recommendations.overview: After a friend overdoses, Spoon and Stretch decide to kick their drug habits and attempt to enroll in a government detox program. Their efforts are hampered by seemingly endless red tape, as they are shuffled from one office to another while being ch

recommendations.title: Hereditary
